title: Design System: Hall of the Novice EX

display.purpose: Hero headlines and major titles. Carries the academic weight of the brand.

headline.purpose: Section titles, widget headers, modal titles. Structured authority.

title.purpose: Card titles, list headers. Concise hierarchy markers.

body.purpose: All readable content. Generous line-height for comfortable reading.

label.purpose: Tags, stat labels, metadata. Compact and structured.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Default card/container state. Almost imperceptible ambient lift.

shadows.name: ambient-mid
shadows.purpose: Hover/focus state. Gentle breathing lift that rewards interaction.

shadows.name: ambient-high
shadows.purpose: Modal overlays, hero banners, elevated elements. Maximum lift.

shadows.name: btn-discord
shadows.purpose: Discord CTA button. Teal-tinted ambient glow.

shadows.name: btn-hero
shadows.purpose: Gold hero CTA. Warm ambient glow signifying importance.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Smooth deceleration.

motion.name: ease-bounce
motion.purpose: Modal scale-in. Slight overshoot for playful arrival.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: hover lifts, color shifts, background changes.

components.name: Primary Button (Teal)
components.description: Standard action button. Teal background with white text, pill shape.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal) 0%, var(--teal-dark) 100%); color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 20px; padding: 10px 20px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.2); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.3); }

components.name: Accent Button (Gold)
components.description: Hero CTA. Gold background with deep teal text. Reserved for the single most important action.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { background: var(--gold); color: var(--teal-dark); border: none; border-radius: 25px; padding: 12px 28px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.3); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: var(--gold-accent); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.5); }

components.name: Post Card
components.description: Content card with gradient header, category tag, title, excerpt, and author meta.
components.html:
"
Pilares

Conceito e Pilares

Expandindo o conceito do Hall of the Novice.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.04); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.12); border-color: var(--gold); } .ds-card-header { height: 130px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 55px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal-light) 0%, rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.4) 100%); } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex: 1; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--teal-dark); margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-card-excerpt { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Sidebar navigation item. Muted text, transparent background, teal highlight on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; color: var(--text-muted); font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.active { background-color: var(--teal-light); color: var(--teal); } .ds-nav-link.active { font-weight: 600; border-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.25); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.04); }

components.name: Category Tag
components.description: Small pill badge for content categories. Color-coded by type.
components.css: .ds-tag { align-self: flex-start; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-bottom: 12px; background-color: var(--teal-light); color: var(--teal); } .ds-tag.gold { background-color: var(--gold-light); color: #8B7318; } .ds-tag.lavender { background-color: var(--lavender-light); color: #7A6B94; }

components.name: Widget Container
components.description: Sidebar widget box. White background, subtle border, rounded corners.
components.css: .ds-widget { background-color: var(--bg-card); border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.04); } .ds-widget-title { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--teal-dark); margin-bottom: 18px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact stat block in 2x2 grid. Color-tinted background with large numeral.
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background-color: var(--teal-light); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid rgba(29, 106, 106, 0.05); } .ds-stat-card.alt-gold { background-color: var(--gold-light); border-color: rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.05); } .ds-stat-card.alt-lavender { background-color: var(--lavender-light); border-color: rgba(155, 139, 180, 0.05); } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Cinzel', serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--teal-dark); margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Search Bar
components.description: Header search input. Rounded pill shape, expands on focus.
components.css: .ds-search-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background-color: var(--bg-sidebar); padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 30px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.04); width: 350px; border: 1px solid var(--border-color); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-search-bar:focus-within { border-color: var(--teal); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(62, 74, 86, 0.08); width: 380px; } .ds-search-bar input { border: none; outline: none; font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-main); width: 100%; background: transparent; }

narrative.overview: The HoN design system evokes a warm, lived-in academic space — part university library, part cozy common room. Every surface should feel like a place you want to sit down and study in. The ivory parchment background is the foundation: not sterile white, not dark gaming den, but the warm glow of aged paper under lamplight. Teal carries the institutional identity (the Sharlayan academy), gold marks moments of importance and distinction, and lavender adds a quiet scholarly softness that prevents the palette from feeling too rigid.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment foundation with institutional teal identity
Serif display type (Cinzel) paired with clean modern sans-serif body (Inter)
Soft shadows and gentle transitions — never jarring
Dark mode as 'Eorzean Nightfall' — deeper tones, not inverted extremes
Gold accents reserved for moments of distinction

rules.name: The Gold Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Scholar's Gold appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it meaningful.

rules.name: The Parchment Foundation Rule
rules.body: The warm ivory background is non-negotiable. Never replace it with pure white or cool gray.

rules.name: The Serif Authority Rule
rules.body: Cinzel is reserved for display, headlines, and titles — moments where the design speaks with authority. It never appears in body text, labels, or UI chrome.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus).

dos: Do use the warm parchment background (#FAF6ED) as the canvas for every surface.
Do reserve Scholar's Gold (#D4AF37) for moments of distinction — CTAs, achievement markers, active-state accents.
Do use Cinzel for display and headlines to carry the academic authority of the brand.
Do keep shadows diffused and ambient.
Do use the gold border shift on card hover as a subtle attention signal.
Do support dark mode as 'Eorzean Nightfall' — deeper charcoal tones, not inverted extremes.
Do use generous whitespace and calm hierarchy.
donts: Don't use generic gaming portal aesthetics — neon colors, aggressive dark backgrounds, e-sports visual language.
Don't use glassmorphism, gradient text, bounce animations, or anything that reads as AI-generated gaming site.
Don't replace the warm parchment background with pure white or cool gray.
Don't use Cinzel in body text, labels, or UI chrome.
Don't overuse gold. The Gold Scarcity Rule is absolute.
Don't add decorative elements that don't serve learning or navigation.
